# Release v0.1.0

## Vibe Voice public release

First public release of `Vibe Voice`.

### Included

- real-time local viewer for compatible assistant sessions
- WebSocket backend and static web UI
- optional text-to-speech flow
- optional desktop dictation utility for Windows
- Kiro-related support docs already included in the repository

### Repo cleanup

- app renamed to `Vibe Voice`
- public-facing `README.md` rewritten
- `.gitignore` added to prevent leaking local data
- `.env.example` expanded with safer defaults
- license, contributing guide and security policy added
- basic GitHub Actions CI added

### Notes

This project is designed for local usage and some features are platform-dependent.
